Book Private Tour
Abu Dhabi's Premier Boat Charter

Exclusive Private Boat Tours in Abu Dhabi

Craft your perfect day at sea. Explore majestic islands, enjoy customized BBQ lunches, experience thrilling water sports, or relax on pristine hidden beaches.

Book Your Escape Explore Packages

100% Private & Safe

Exclusive use of the boat for your group of up to 7 guests with certified captain.

All-Inclusive Pricing

Ice, water, fuel, life jacket, and specialized equipment included. No hidden fees.

Set Durations

Each package runs for its fixed duration as listed below — clear timings, no surprises.

Your safety is our highest priority. Every trip is led by a certified captain with life jackets and full safety equipment on board. From departure to return, you are in safe, experienced hands at all times.

Tailored Experiences

Unforgettable Ocean Adventures

Mix and match your favorite ocean activities to design an unforgettable bespoke sea itinerary.

Island Exploration

Cruise to serene locations like Salt Island or Al Maya to discover untouched coastlines and clear waters.

Leisure Fishing

Try your hand at premium light-tackle fishing. All rods, baits, and expert guidance are provided onboard.

Live BBQ Onboard

Savor a premium fresh live-barbecued meal cooked right on the boat's tailored deck while anchored at sea.

Banana Boat & Donut

Feel the pure rush of adrenaline as you glide across the waves on our high-speed watersport towables.

Sunset Cruises

Watch the legendary Arabian sun dip beneath the glittering cityscape skyline from your open deck views.

Island Beach Picnic

Anchor at pristine natural sandbanks and step ashore to swim, relax, and soak in the sea views.

Curated Charters

Select Your Sea Package

Transparent, flat-rate premium pricing for the entire boat — up to 7 guests per trip. We also host private parties & celebrations with fully customized arrangements.

Weekday Special: Enjoy 10% off any package on any weekday (excludes weekends & national holidays).

On Demand

Boat Pick-Up & Drop

We drop you at a covered destination, then return to collect you whenever you call — the boat doesn't wait with you.

  • Pick-Up from Marasy, Al Bateen
  • Drop-Off at Any Covered Destination
  • Professional Captain Onboard
  • Return Pick-Up On Call
  • Group Size: Up to 7 Guests

* Return pick-up is subject to boat availability and may involve a short wait during busy periods.

24 FT Yamaha Luxury Edition
Elite Craftsmanship

Step Aboard Luxury

Our custom-built, modern 24ft Yamaha high-speed vessel perfectly blends high-octane sporting performance with absolute premium lounge comfort.

Equipped with expansive sunbeds, fresh deep cushions, full protective shade biminis, and a high-fidelity integrated sound system, it guarantees smooth navigation through Abu Dhabi's marine waters.

Capacity Max 7 Guests
Power Twin High-Output Engines
Audio Premium Bluetooth Setup
Amenities Onboard Deck Grill & Iceboxes
